_doc: Reference data for the English pivot (en). function_words = the closed-class English tokens that are NOT content lexemes; used by the THOT<->HC co-training loop to gate root proposals (a vernacular word aligning to a CONTENT word is a candidate lexeme; aligning to a function word is grammatical and not a root). Pivot-side resource (a property of English, the gateway language), loaded by review.langknow — not baked into the algorithm.
